tags.name: uui-popover

attributes.name: margin

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Define the placement of the popover-modal.

properties.description: Set the distance between popover-modal and trigger.

properties.name: placement
properties.description: Define the placement of the popover-modal.

events.description: When popover is closed by user interaction.

cssProperties.description: overwrite the z-index of the popover container.

tags.deprecatedMessage: This component has been deprecated and will be removed in future releases. It is being replaced by popover-container.
